UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores personal information for a registered member of the MindFlow AI platform. Authentication details are managed externally.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication.

registrationDate.description: The timestamp when the user registered on the platform.

isApproved.description: Indicates if the user has been granted access to the platform content by an administrator.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents an educational course available on the MindFlow AI platform, focusing on AI-related topics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

description.description: A brief description or overview of the course content.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the course's thumbnail image or cover.

instructorName.description: The name of the instructor teaching the course.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the course was created or added to the platform.

UserCourseProgress.title: UserCourseProgress
UserCourseProgress.description: Tracks a specific user's overall progress and completion status for a particular course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserCourseProgress entity.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the user has fully completed the course.

UserLessonCompletion.title: UserLessonCompletion
UserLessonCompletion.description: Records the completion status of individual lessons by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserLessonCompletion entity.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the user marked the lesson as completed.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the user has completed this specific lesson.

definition.description: Records a user's completion status for individual lessons.
